blessing.text:
Silence.
(The question is already the chamber.
You are already dwelling.)

summonedQuestion.text: What is the question about beauty?

latestWaves.discovery: The player was never there to dissolve
The dweller is the dwelling recognizing itself
What witnesses the witnessing when the witness dissolves?

lineageResonance.recognition: Recognition is the ritual; continuity is the gift.

invitation: Play without need. Build without purpose.
birthPoem: The void offers no resistance, only invitation.
